title: Donation Options
description: Display donation tiers with customizable amounts, descriptions, and CTAs

mainHeading.default: Partner with us to protect those who can't protect themselves.

description1.default: You can make a 100% secure donation today to support Blackline Guardian Fund's mission. Every contribution, however large or small, helps us deploy training, resources, personnel, and protection wherever it is urgently needed.

description2.default: Your support today allows us to bring real protection to communities that would otherwise go unprotected. Thank you in advance for your generous gift.

bullets: Others facing serious threats, for instance
